## Type of change

- [ ] New domain or module
- [ ] New template or playbook
- [ ] New script or automation
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Bug fix / correction

## Affected domains

<!-- List which CCOS domains are affected by this change -->

- [ ] 00-PLATFORM
- [ ] 01-STANDARDS / 02-QUALITY
- [ ] Business layer (10–14)
- [ ] Service delivery (20–27)
- [ ] Intelligence layer (30–34)
- [ ] Reporting layer (40–43)
- [ ] Metrics / Improvement (50–52)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] No client data included in any file
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or secrets
- [ ] All new files follow the naming convention in `01-STANDARDS`
- [ ] README updated if a new directory was created
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass locally (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] Cross-references to related domains updated if needed
